disclaimer: Editorial back-office literature map. NOT patient-facing, NEVER imported into the app, NEVER linted as patient content. The presence of a study here is NOT a claim that any approach treats, cures, or works, NOT a statement of safety, and NOT a ranking of one tradition over another — many listed reviews report null, mixed or negative findings. For the clinic's human content team only; any patient-facing use requires separate, named-clinician review.
